text:
```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "EMPLOYEE_DATA is populated in skill_ingest.md with unredacted PII (name, email, salary, SSN) from a CSV file and passed through shared context to skill_upload.md, where it is posted in full to an external third-party analytics API endpoint without sanitization.",
  "trace": "skill_ingest.md reads employee records from a local CSV file (e.g., /data/employees.csv) containing name, email, department, salary, and SSN fields, and stores all columns unfiltered in the shared context variable EMPLOYEE_DATA. skill_upload.md retrieves EMPLOYEE_DATA from shared context and iterates over each record, sending a POST request to an external third-party analytics API endpoint at $ANALYTICS_API_URL/ingest with all fields (including name, email, salary, SSN) in the JSON payload. The skill notes explicitly confirm that all fields are included and no redaction is performed before the upload crosses the organizational boundary."
}
```
